The '''''Tuima''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During and immediately prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it was a part of the reformed [[Defiance Task Force]], centered around the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
